data.name: The Last Progenitor - Chapter 1
data.short_description: The Last Progenitor is an adult visual novel that emphasizes player choices. You can decide whether to take the helm as the CEO of your late parents' company or begin from the ground up and work your way to the top. Your journey will be rich with intrigue, betrayals, and captivating women.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 捷克文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0-capable graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 65-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0-capable graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0-capable graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

data.name: The Last Progenitor - Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
Losing your parents at a young age led you to venture abroad. Now, as an adult, you return to your hometown to take the reins of your late parents' company. As you explore your options for the future, you'll unlock new scenes and encounters, all while being surrounded by intriguing and beautiful women, with even more surprises in store!

  • Explore this story from the first-person perspective of the main character, incorporating elements of a third-person viewpoint, such as flashbacks and various scenarios.

  • Decide whether to pursue the role of CEO or begin your career at the entry level and work your way up.

  • As you explore the intricacies of your world, you will unlock a distinctive gallery featuring a diverse array of women, accompanied by brief descriptions.
